name: spikalabs-design-kit
description: Internal spikalabs design-kit skills with symbol-led Neo-brutalist guidance derived from the reference website style

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped spikalabs Neo-brutal UI and brand skills
interface.longDescription: Reusable spikalabs design-kit skills for Codex and compatible agent-skill CLIs. Use them to apply symbol-led Neo-brutalist UI, brand, frontend, image-to-code, and output-enforcement guidance inside a project.
